## Testing

- [ ] Ran `pnpm check`
- [ ] Updated docs if needed
- [ ] Updated registry output if component/registry changed
- [ ] Added or updated tests if behavior changed

## Type

Use Conventional Commit-style PR titles when possible.

- [ ] fix
- [ ] feat
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] chore
- [ ] test
- [ ] ci
